provenance_note: does not satisfy proof_runtime; not W8 DONE; not operator-pass; not V-PASS; not C6 acceptance; not mobile; not true-device; not live proof
settled_source_of_truth: openspec/changes/define-t09-session-lifecycle-recovery/specs/session-lifecycle/spec.md heading '### Requirement: Child disposition and cancellation fence' SHALL clause naming cancelled/terminal/unsupported/timedOutFenced
k2_extension_note: K2 delivery layer adds a 'pending' initial state that precedes any settled disposition. 'pending' is NOT in the define-t09 SHALL settled set; it is the pre-settlement bookkeeping state used only inside SessionLifecycleChildRegistry until an ack or fence transitions to a settled disposition.
test_oracle_independence_note: K2 tests hard-code these member names as expected assertion values; tests MUST NOT derive expected values by iterating SessionChildDisposition.allCases (that would be self-referential to the implementation under test).
